name: @unerp/blockchain
description: UniERP Blockchain Integration — Hyperledger Fabric hybrid layer

scripts.chaincode:build:document-registry: cd chaincode/document-registry && pnpm install && pnpm build
scripts.chaincode:build:finance-ledger: cd chaincode/finance-ledger && pnpm install && pnpm build
scripts.chaincode:build:supply-chain: cd chaincode/supply-chain && pnpm install && pnpm build
scripts.chaincode:build:procurement: cd chaincode/procurement && pnpm install && pnpm build
scripts.chaincode:build:all: pnpm run chaincode:build:document-registry && pnpm run chaincode:build:finance-ledger && pnpm run chaincode:build:supply-chain && pnpm run chaincode:build:procurement
